resources.string: Screen will stay on. Tap tile to disable.
Caffeinate needs the \"Modify system settings\" permission to control your screen timeout.

Add the Caffeinate tile to your Quick Settings panel:

1. Swipe down from the top of your screen
2. Swipe down again to expand the full panel
3. Tap the pencil/edit icon
4. Find "Caffeinate" and drag it into your active tiles

Tap the coffee cup tile anytime to keep your screen on.
Caffeinate also needs notification permission to show a reminder when active.
